# CLEAR Prompt Library — Marketing

Use each prompt with CLEAR: Context, Limits, Examples, Action, Review.

## 1. Content Batch Builder

```text
Context:
[Paste relevant business context/source material]

Limits:
[Approvals, sensitive data, tone, length, constraints]

Examples:
[Paste a good example if available]

Action:
Using these source notes, create 5 content angles, 3 hooks per angle, and 1 recommended best post. Preserve founder voice. Do not invent proof.

Review:
Before finalizing, score the output 1-5 on accuracy, usefulness, brand fit, risk, and next-action clarity.
```

## 2. Campaign Brief

```text
Context:
[Paste relevant business context/source material]

Limits:
[Approvals, sensitive data, tone, length, constraints]

Examples:
[Paste a good example if available]

Action:
Turn this offer into a campaign brief: audience, pain, promise, proof, objection, assets needed, CTA, and approval checklist.

Review:
Before finalizing, score the output 1-5 on accuracy, usefulness, brand fit, risk, and next-action clarity.
```

## 3. Brand Voice Rewrite

```text
Context:
[Paste relevant business context/source material]

Limits:
[Approvals, sensitive data, tone, length, constraints]

Examples:
[Paste a good example if available]

Action:
Rewrite this draft in our brand voice. Keep the idea, sharpen the hook, remove generic AI language, and add one concrete business example.

Review:
Before finalizing, score the output 1-5 on accuracy, usefulness, brand fit, risk, and next-action clarity.
```
